leadText: Dark Pulse (Japanese: あくのはどう Evil Pulse) is a damage-dealing Dark-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM79 in Generation IV and Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM97 from Generation VI to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TM20 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR58 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM094 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM090 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation IV 1.2 Generation V onwards 1.3 Generation VIII 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.4 Generation IX 1.4.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Dark Pulse inflicts damage and has a 20% chance of causing the target to flinch . Generation V onwards [ edit | edit source ] Dark Pulse can hit non-adjacent opponents in Triple Battles . Dark Pulse's power is increased by 50% when used by a Pokémon with the Ability Mega Launcher . Dark Pulse is no longer affected by King's Rock . Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , Dark Pulse's PP was lowered from 15 to 10, and the move can no longer cause flinching. Instead, it bypasses accuracy and evasion checks to always hit. sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR B W B2 W2 The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. It may also make the target flinch. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. This may also make the target flinch. LA The user releases a horrible aura imbued with ill intent. This attack never misses. S V The user releases a horrible aura imbued with ill intent. This may also make the target flinch. ZA The user attacks by releasing a horrible aura rife with ill intent. This may also make targets flinch.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Inflicts damage on enemies within a 1-tile range. It may also afflict enemies with a Cringe status condition, which makes its actions fail. B S L まわりの てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも いっていのかくりつで ひるみじょうたいにして わざや こうげきを だせなくする MD GtI It damages nearby enemies. It could also cause the Cringe status, which makes the enemy unable to attack or use moves. S MD It damages nearby enemies. It could also make them flinch.
